# <type>(<scope>): <subject>
# Short summary of changes in 50 characters or less (e.g., feat(auth): add JWT rotation)
# Refer to the guideline below for the prefix tags.

# ----------------- BODY -----------------
# Explain the "why" and "what" behind the changes, not just the "how".
# Wrap lines at 72 characters.


# ----------------- FOOTER -----------------
# References to related issues or breaking changes.
# E.g., Closes #123
# E.g., BREAKING CHANGE: User API requires 'birthdate' field now.

# ----------------------------------------
# Guideline for tags:
#   feat     : A new feature
#   fix      : A bug fix
#   docs     : Documentation changes
#   style    : Code style changes (formatting, missing semi-colons, etc; no production code changes)
#   refactor : Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
#   perf     : Code change that improves performance
#   test     : Adding missing tests or correcting existing tests
#   build    : Changes that affect the build system or external dependencies (e.g., Maven, npm)
#   ci       : Changes to CI configuration files and scripts (e.g., GitHub Actions)
#   chore    : Other changes that don't modify src or test files
# ----------------------------------------
